name: Orange Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients.
2. Cream the butter (or shortening) together with sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the well beaten eggs, orange juice, and grated orange rind and vanilla; mix well.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Drop by teaspoon onto a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 15 minutes.
